    Description
    FoulingModel
    Dynamic fouling model for heat exchangers based on the Ebert-Panchal (1997) threshold fouling correlation.

    Fouling model type selection.
    HeatExchangerDesignFeasibilityReport
    Design feasibility report for heat exchangers.

    A single feasibility issue or observation.
    HeatExchangerDesignFeasibilityReport.IssueSeverity
    Severity levels for feasibility issues.
    HeatExchangerDesignFeasibilityReport.SupplierMatch
    Data class for a heat exchanger supplier match.
    HeatExchangerMechanicalDesign
    Mechanical design for a generic heat exchanger.
    HeatExchangerMechanicalDesign.HeatExchangerValidationResult
    Inner class to hold validation results.
    HeatExchangerMechanicalDesign.SelectionCriterion
    Ranking metric for automatic exchanger-type selection.
    HeatExchangerSizingResult
    Result structure capturing calculated geometry and performance indicators for a candidate heat exchanger type.
    HeatExchangerSizingResult.Builder
    Builder for HeatExchangerSizingResult.
    HeatExchangerType
    Catalogue of supported heat-exchanger configurations and their typical design data.
    HeatExchangerType.GeometryModel
     
    IncrementalZoneAnalysis.IncrementalZone
    Represents a single incremental zone in the heat exchanger.
    IncrementalZoneAnalysis.PhaseRegime
    Phase regime within a zone.
    ShellAndTubeDesignCalculator
    Shell and tube heat exchanger design calculator per TEMA standards.
    TEMAStandard.BaffleType
    Baffle types per TEMA.
    TEMAStandard.FrontHeadType
    TEMA front head types (stationary head).
    TEMAStandard.RearHeadType
    TEMA rear head types.
    TEMAStandard.ShellType
    TEMA shell types.
    TEMAStandard.StandardTubeSize
    Standard tube sizes per TEMA.
    TEMAStandard.TEMAClass
    TEMA class for construction standards.
    TEMAStandard.TEMAConfiguration
    Represents a complete TEMA configuration.
    TEMAStandard.TubePitchPattern
    Standard tube pitches per TEMA.
    ThermalDesignCalculator
    Thermal-hydraulic design calculator for shell and tube heat exchangers.
    ThermalDesignCalculator.ShellSideMethod
    Shell-side analysis method selection.
    ThermalDesignCalculator.ZoneDefinition
    Defines a thermal zone for zone-by-zone analysis.
    ThermalDesignCalculator.ZoneResult
    Results for a single thermal zone.
    TubeInsertModel
    Enhanced tube insert models for heat exchanger performance improvement.
    TubeInsertModel.InsertType
    Type of tube insert enhancement device.
    VibrationAnalysis.VibrationResult
    Results of vibration screening analysis.
